search.title: How can we help?
search.description: Find answers, guides and support for any question about Manga Reader.
search.placeholder: How to change reading direction, forgot my password...

articles.emptyDesc: Try different terms or open a ticket with our team.

article.notFoundDesc: The article you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. Head back to the Help Center and search for another topic.

1: To change your email or password, go to Settings → Account. There you'll find the email and password fields with edit options.
When changing your email, we send a confirmation link to the new address — the change only takes effect after you confirm via that link.
For the password, you must enter your current password before setting a new one. Use at least 8 characters, mixing letters and numbers, for better security.
If you no longer have access to your current email, open a ticket with our team to verify your identity manually.
2: Reading direction can be set both globally and per title. For the global default, go to Settings → Reading → Direction.
The available options are: continuous vertical (ideal for webtoons/manhwa), horizontal left-to-right, and horizontal right-to-left (the standard for Japanese manga).
Inside the reader, the gear icon lets you override the direction for the current chapter only, without changing your global preference.
3: On the login screen, click "Forgot my password" and enter your registered email. We'll send a temporary reset link; its validity will be shown after the request.
Also check your spam folder if the email doesn't arrive within a few minutes. The link can only be used once.
After setting the new password, all active sessions on other devices are ended for security.
4: The interface language is changed in Settings → Language, or via the language selector in the menu. The change applies immediately.
The interface language is independent from the content language (catalog and comments), which you set separately under Content languages.
Your interface language preference is stored in the browser; when you sign in, it follows your profile.
5: To cancel your subscription, go to Settings → Subscription → Cancel. Cancellation is immediate, with no penalty.
You keep access to supporter-plan features until the end of the period already paid — there is no prorated refund for the current period.
After the period ends, your account automatically returns to the free plan, with no loss of history or library.
6: If the app is slow, start by clearing the cache in Settings → Clear cache. This fixes most image-loading stutters.
Also check your connection and whether the app/browser is up to date. Blocking extensions can interfere with page loading.
If the slowness persists, open a ticket with your device, browser and the chapter where the problem happens — this speeds up diagnosis.

contact.eyebrow: Didn't find what you were looking for?
contact.title: Talk to the team

items.1: How do I change my email or password?
items.2: How do I change the reading direction (horizontal/vertical)?
items.3: I forgot my password — how do I recover it?
items.4: How do I change the interface language?
items.5: How do I cancel my subscription?
items.6: The app is slow — what should I do?

1.a: Yes, basic reading is completely free. There is an optional supporter plan that removes ads and unlocks extra features.

2.q: How do I import my MyAnimeList / AniList list?
2.a: Go to Settings → Library → Import list. We support MAL XML and AniList JSON imports.

3.a: Yes, supporter plan users can download chapters for offline reading on iOS and Android apps.

4.q: How do I report a chapter with translation issues?
4.a: Open the chapter, click the ⋮ menu and select "Report issue". Our moderation team reviews within 48h.

5.q: Does the site have a mobile app?
5.a: We have native iOS and Android apps in development. In the meantime, the site is fully responsive and works well on mobile.

6.q: How do I cancel support and keep access until the end of the period?
6.a: Cancel in Settings → Subscription → Cancel. Access remains active until the end of the period already paid.

7.q: Can I request a title be added?
7.a: Yes! Go to Forum → Title requests and open a topic with the title, author and link to an official source.

8.q: How long is reading data kept?
8.a: Your history and progress are kept while your account is active, plus 90 days after closing.
